untranslatable_reason: This signal requires tracking an external 'trading model' state and comparing current model signals against previous signals. The model's signal direction is not derivable from price/technical indicators alone. The rule depends on: (1) storing the direction of the previous model signal, (2) detecting when a new opposite signal is generated, and (3) executing reversal logic. This requires external signal injection and state management beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: CHAN_QT_DRY_0 is a meta-rule for position reversal based on external model signals, not a technical pattern. It requires the backtest engine to: (a) accept trading model signals as external inputs, (b) maintain position state, and (c) execute reversals when signal polarity flips. Recommend implementing this as a separate signal handler in the backtest engine rather than as a technical indicator rule.
